title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Go First Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Go First Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
